amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጥቃት በኢራን እና በኢራቅ መካከል በሚገኘው የሻላምቼ የድንበር ማቋረጫ ላይ ተፈጽሟል። ይህ ድንገተኛ ጥቃት በቦታው ላይ የነበሩ ተጓዦችን ከፍተኛ ፍርሃት ውስጥ ጥሏቸዋል። የኢራን መህር የዜና ወኪል እንደዘገበው ከሆነ፣ ጥቃቱ የሁለት ሰዎችን ሕይወት የቀጠፈ ሲሆን ሌሎች አስራ አንድ ሰዎች ላይ ደግሞ ጉዳት አድርሷል።
oromo: Humni waraanaa Ameerikaa daangaa biyyoota Iraan fi Iraaq gidduutti argamu Shalamcheh jedhamurratti haleellaa raawwateera. Haleellaan kun namoota achitti imalaa turan gidduutti rifaatumaa guddaa uumee jira. Gabaasni ejansii oduu Iraan Mehr akka ibsetti, haleellaa kanaan lubbuun namoota lamaa darbee, namoonni kudha tokko immoo miidhaniiru.

title: India’s Modi promises fast-track courts for exam fraud fuelling protests
english: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi has announced plans to establish fast-track courts to provide quick legal consequences for individuals involved in exam paper leaks. This promise follows widespread youth-led protests, organized by the Cockroach Janta Party, which demand education reforms and the resignation of the Education Minister. However, protest leaders have criticized the proposal, arguing that it fails to address the deep systemic issues causing these exam irregularities.
amharic: የህንድ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ናሬንድራ ሞዲ፣ የፈተና ወረቀት ሌብነትን የሚፈጽሙ ሰዎችን በፍጥነት ለፍርድ የሚያቀርቡ ልዩ ፍርድ ቤቶችን እንደሚያቋቁሙ ቃል ገብተዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በኮክሮች ጃንታ ፓርቲ የሚመራው እና የትምህርት ሚኒስትሩን ስልጣን መልቀቅ የሚጠይቀው የተማሪዎች ተቃውሞ እየተባባሰ በመምጣቱ ነው። ይሁን እንጂ የተቃውሞው አስተባባሪዎች ይህ መፍትሄ የትምህርት ስርዓቱን መሰረታዊ ችግሮች የሚፈታ አይደለም በማለት ነቅፈውታል።
oromo: Mummichi Ministeera Indiyaa Narendra Moodiin, namoota qormaata biyyoolessaa hatan hatattamaan adabsiisuuf mana murtii addaa akka hundeessan waadaa galaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe, garee 'Cockroach Janta Party' jedhamuun qopha'ee fi Ministeerri Barnootaa aangoo gadhiisuu akka qaban gaafatu erga jabaatee booda. Ta'us, qindeessitoonni mormichaa yaanni kun rakkoo sirna barnootaa keessa jiru furuuf ga'aa miti jechuun mormaniiru.

title: Top US and Russian diplomats discuss Ukraine war in Manila
english: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov held a brief meeting in Manila to discuss the ongoing war in Ukraine. While Lavrov signaled Russia's openness to a diplomatic resolution based on previous high-level proposals, he also strongly criticized Western arms supplies to Kyiv. The US side acknowledged the difficulty the conflict poses for bilateral relations but expressed a continued desire to find ways to bring the fighting to an end.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ እና የሩሲያው አቻቸው ሰርጌ ላቭሮቭ በዩክሬን ጦርነት ዙሪያ ለመነጋገር በፊሊፒንስ መዲና ማኒላ ተገናኝተዋል። በውይይቱ ላቭሮቭ ቀደም ሲል በነበሩ የመሪዎች ስምምነቶች መሰረት ለፖለቲካዊ መፍትሄ ዝግጁ መሆናቸውን የገለጹ ሲሆን፣ የምዕራባውያን ለዩክሬን የሚያደርጉትን የጦር መሳሪያ ድጋፍ ግን ተቃውመዋል። አሜሪካ በበኩሏ የዩክሬን ጦርነት በሁለቱ አገራት ግንኙነት ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ እያሳደረ መሆኑን በመጥቀስ፣ ጦርነቱን ለማቆም የሚደረገውን ጥረት እንደምትደግፍ አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimmi Alaa Ameerikaa Maarkoo Ruubiyoo fi Ministirri Dhimmi Alaa Raashiyaa Sergey Laavroov dhimma waraana Yuukireen irratti mari'achuuf magaalaa Maaniilaa keessatti wal arganiiru. Laavroov waraana kana xumuruuf marii dippiloomaasiif fedhii qabaachuu isaanii ibsanus, biyyoonni Dhihaa Yuukireeniif meeshaa waraanaa dhiyeessuu akka dhaaban gaafataniiru. Gama Ameerikaatiin, waraanni kun hariiroo biyyoota lamaan gidduu jiru irratti dhiibbaa cimaa geessisaa akka jiru ibsuun, waraana kana dhaabuuf carraaqqii taasifamu kan deggaran ta'uu beeksisaniiru.

title: Arsenal defender Saliba sidelined for ‘extended period’ due to back injury
english: Arsenal defender William Saliba will be out of action for a significant time due to a back injury sustained during the 2026 World Cup. Although he does not require surgery, he will undergo a structured rehabilitation program to recover his fitness. The club is currently focused on his recovery as they prepare to defend their Premier League title without him for the start of the season.
amharic: የአርሰናል ተከላካይ የሆነው ዊሊያም ሳሊባ በ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ወቅት በደረሰበት የጀርባ ጉዳት ምክንያት ለረጅም ጊዜ ከሜዳ እንደሚርቅ ታውቋል። ምንም እንኳን የቀዶ ጥገና ሕክምና የማያስፈልገው ቢሆንም፣ ሙሉ በሙሉ ለማገገም የረጅም ጊዜ የሕክምና ክትትልና የመልሶ ማቋቋም ፕሮግራም ይጀምራል። አርሰናል የፕሪሚየር ሊግ ዋንጫውን ለመከላከል በሚዘጋጅበት በዚህ ወቅት፣ ተጫዋቹ በአስቸኳይ ወደ ብቃቱ እንዲመለስ ክለቡ አስፈላጊውን ድጋፍ እያደረገለት ይገኛል።
oromo: Ispoortii kubbaa miilaa irratti, ittisaan garee Arsenal William Saliba madaa dugdaa bara 2026 waancaa addunyaarratti isa mudateen kan ka'e yeroo dheeraaf dirree irraa akka fagaatu beekameera. Akkaataa madaa isaa irratti hundaa'uun yeroof baqaqsanii hodhuun kan isa hin barbaachisne ta'us, fayyummaa isaa guutuuf jecha sagantaa deebisanii dhaabuu (rehabilitation) keessa darba. Gareen Arsenal dorgommii liigii Ingilizii eegaluuf qophaa'aa jiru keessatti, Saliba ariitiin akka deebi'uuf gargaarsa barbaachisaa ta'e godhaafii jira.

title: Between hope and fear: Yemenis react to Houthi blockade on Saudi Arabia
english: The Houthis have initiated a naval blockade against Saudi Arabia, triggering widespread anxiety among Yemenis that a prolonged period of relative calm may be nearing its end. Citizens fear that this escalation will lead to renewed conflict, severe fuel shortages, and a worsening humanitarian crisis that will make daily survival nearly impossible. While Houthi supporters view the move as a challenge to Saudi influence, many ordinary people worry they will ultimately bear the brunt of the instability and economic hardship.
amharic: ሁቲዎች በሳውዲ አረቢያ ላይ የባህር ላይ እገዳ መጣላቸው በየመን ህዝቦች ዘንድ ከፍተኛ ስጋት የፈጠረ ሲሆን፣ ለተወሰኑ ዓመታት የቆየው አንጻራዊ ሰላም ሊያበቃ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት እንዲፈጠር አድርጓል። ይህ የሁቲዎች እርምጃ እንደገና ጦርነትን በመቀስቀስ የነዳጅ እጥረት እና የሰብአዊ ቀውስን ያባብሳል ብለው ነዋሪዎች ይፈራሉ። የሁቲ ደጋፊዎች ይህንን እርምጃ እንደ ድል ቢቆጥሩትም፣ ተራው የየመን ህዝብ ግን በኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና በኑሮ ውድነት መከራን እንደሚያስተናግድ ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Houthiwwan Sa'udii Arabiyaa irratti harka galchaa galaana irraa erga godhanii booda, Yemen keessatti sodaafi yaaddoon babal'atee jira. Sababa kanaan, waggoota muraasaaf ture nagaanifi tasgabbiin akka xumuramuufi waraanni haaraan akka ka'u namoonni hedduun sodaachaa jiru. Tarkaanfiin kun hanqina boba'aafi rakkoo namoomaa kan babal'isu ta'uusaatiin, jireenyi guyyuu uummataarratti dhiibbaa cimaa geessisa jedhamee sodaatama. Deeggartoonni Houthii tarkaanfichaan yoo gammadanis, namoonni baay'een garuu qabsoo kanaan miidhamuu isaanitti yaadda'u.

title: Jordanian army intercepts Iranian missiles
english: The Jordanian military reported that it successfully blocked three missiles launched from Iran earlier today. Additionally, a fourth missile landed in an empty region of the country, resulting in no reported casualties. This incident highlights the regional tensions surrounding recent aerial activities.
amharic: የዮርዳኖስ ጦር ዛሬ ማለዳ ከኢራን የተተኮሱ ሶስት ሚሳኤሎችን መትቶ መጣሉን አስታውቋል። ሌላ አንድ ሚሳኤል በሰው አልባ አካባቢ መውደቁም ተገልጿል። በዚህ ድርጊት የደረሰ ጉዳት እንደሌለ ተመልክቷል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Yordaanos ganama har'a misaa'eloota Iran irraa dhukaafaman sadii akka rukutee kuffise beeksiseera. Misaa'elli afraffaan tokko ammoo lafa namni hin jiraanne keessatti kufuu isaa gabaasaniiru. Kanaan walqabatee miidhaan nama irra ga'e akka hin jirre ibsameera.

title: Explosions heard in Iran's Konarak
english: Several loud explosions have been reported in the city of Konarak, located within Iran's Sistan and Baluchestan province. The news was shared by the Iranian Tasnim news agency. Official details regarding the cause or potential damage from these blasts have not yet been released.
amharic: በኢራን ሲስታን እና ባሉቼስታን ግዛት ውስጥ በሚገኘው ኮናራክ ከተማ በርካታ የፍንዳታ ድምፆች ተሰምተዋል። ይህንኑ የኢራኑ ታስኒም የዜና ወኪል ዘግቧል። ስለ ፍንዳታዎቹ መንስኤ ወይም ስለደረሰው ጉዳት እስካሁን በይፋ የታወቀ ነገር የለም።
oromo: Magaalaa Konarak kan naannoo Sistan fi Baluchestan keessa jirtutti sagaleen dhohiinsa gurguddaa dhagahameera. Gabaasni kun kan dhiyaate ejansii oduu Iraan Tasnimiti. Sababa dhohiinsichaa ykn miidhaa gahuu danda'e irratti hanga ammaatti odeeffannoon ifa ta'e hin jiru.

title: How Israel used Venezuela earthquake response for propaganda in Caracas
english: Following a devastating earthquake in Venezuela that killed over 5,000 people, Israel sent a rescue team to assist with recovery efforts despite having no official diplomatic relations since 2009. Critics suggest that Israel used this humanitarian mission as a public relations strategy to improve its international image amid intense global criticism regarding the war in Gaza. While Venezuela's government officially welcomed and thanked the Israeli delegation for their work, observers view these actions as a symbolic move to break Israel's diplomatic isolation rather than a genuine shift in policy.
amharic: ቬንዙዌላ ውስጥ ከ5,000 በላይ ሰዎችን የገደለ አውዳሚ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ከተከሰተ በኋላ፣ እስራኤል ከ2009 ወዲህ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት ባይኖራትም የእርዳታ ቡድን ልካለች። ተቺዎች እንደሚሉት፣ እስራኤል ይህንን የሰብአዊ እርዳታ ተልዕኮ በጋዛ ጦርነት ምክንያት የተጋረጠባትን ዓለም አቀፍ ትችት ለመቀነስ እና ገጽታዋን ለመገንባት እንደ መጠቀሚያ ተጠቅማበታለች። የቬንዙዌላ መንግስት ቡድኑን በይፋ ቢያመሰግንም፣ ተንታኞች ይህ እንቅስቃሴ በፖሊሲ ለውጥ ከመመራት ይልቅ እስራኤል በዓለም አቀፍ ደረጃ የተገለለችበትን ሁኔታ ለመቀየር የተደረገ ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ስልት እንደሆነ ይገልጻሉ።
oromo: Biyya Veenzuweela keessatti sochiin lafaa cimaan lubbuu namoota 5,000 ol erga galaafatee booda, Israa'el bara 2009 irraa eegalee hariiroo diippilomaasii kan hin qabne taatus garee gargaarsaa ergiteetti. Qeeqtonni akka jedhanitti, Israa'el gargaarsa kana kan fayyadamte waraana Gaazaatiin walqabatee qeeqqa addunyaa irratti ishee qunname hir'isuuf fi suuraa ishee fooyyeffachuuf akka ta'e dubbatu. Mootummaan Veenzuweela garee Israa'el kana erga galateeffatee booda, qaamoleen gargaaran kun sochii kana kan godhan jijjiirama siyaasaatiif osoo hin taane, Israa'el addunyaa irraa adda baatee jirtu sana keessaa bahuuf mala diippilomaasii akka fayyadamte ibsu.

title: Israeli ministers lead mass Al-Aqsa Mosque raid
english: Israeli government ministers and thousands of ultranationalists entered the Al-Aqsa Mosque complex in East Jerusalem under police protection, marking a significant breach of the site's long-standing religious status quo. Palestinian authorities strongly condemned the move, which occurred during the Jewish fast of Tisha B'Av, as a provocative violation of Islamic sanctity. During the event, many Palestinians were prevented from accessing the site for prayers, leading to widespread concerns regarding the potential for further regional instability.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሚኒስትሮች እና በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ አክራሪ አይሁዳውያን በፖሊስ ታጅበው ወደ ምስራቅ እየሩሳሌም የአል-አቅሳ መስጊድ ግቢ በመግባት ለረጅም ጊዜ የቆየውን የሃይማኖታዊ ስፍራ አሰራር ጥሰዋል። የፍልስጤም ባለስልጣናት ይህ ድርጊት በቲሻ ቤአቭ የጾም ወቅት የተፈጸመ እና የእስልምና እምነት ተከታዮችን ስሜት የሚጎዳ ትንኮሳ ነው ሲሉ አውግዘዋል። በዚህ ወቅት ብዙ ፍልስጤማውያን ወደ መስጊዱ እንዳይገቡ በመከልከላቸው በክልሉ ውስጥ ያለውን ውጥረት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Ministiroonni mootummaa Israa'el fi kumaatamaan lakkaa'aman kanneen garmalee hammatan, eegumsa poolisiin gara masjiida Al-Aqsa kan magaalaa Yerusaalem bahaa seenuun, sirna iddoo kanaa duraan ture darbaniiru. Abbootiin taayitaa Falasxiin gocha kana kan balaaleffatan yoo ta'u, kunis guyyaa soomaa Yihuudotaa kan Tisha B'Av irratti raawwatamuun, kabaja iddoo amantii Islaamaa tuquu fi kakka'umsa ta'uu ibsaniiru. Yeroo kana Falasxiinonni hedduun salaataaf iddoo kana akka hin geenye dhorkamuun isaanii, naannichatti soda fi walitti bu'iinsa uumuu danda'uuf madda ta'eera.

title: Wave of US attacks target Iran for 12th night in a row, two killed in Shalamcheh
english: For the twelfth night in a row, the United States launched a series of airstrikes against various locations in Iran. A strike at the Shalamcheh border crossing resulted in at least two deaths and left eleven individuals injured. Additional military attacks were also reported in several other Iranian cities including Bushehr, Ahvaz, and Andimeshk.
amharic: አሜሪካ ለተከታታይ አሥራ ሁለት ምሽቶች ኢራን ውስጥ በተለያዩ ቦታዎች ላይ የአየር ጥቃት ሰንዝራለች። በሻላምቼ የድንበር መተላለፊያ ላይ በተፈጸመ ጥቃት ቢያንስ ሁለት ሰዎች ሲሞቱ ሌሎች አሥራ አንድ ሰዎች ቆስለዋል። እንደ ቡሼር፣ አህዋዝ እና አንዲሜሽክ ባሉ ሌሎች የኢራን ከተሞችም ተመሳሳይ ወታደራዊ ጥቃቶች መፈጸማቸው ተዘግቧል።
oromo: Ameerikaan galgala kudha lamaaf walitti aansuun bakkeewwan garagaraa biyya Iraan keessatti haleellaa qilleensa irraa raawwatteetti. Haleellaa daangaa Shalamcheh irratti gaggeeffameen namoonni lama yoo du'an, kudha tokko immoo madaa'aniiru. Magaalota Iraan kan biroo akka Bushehr, Ahvaz fi Andimeshk keessattis haleellaawwan waraanaa raawwatamuu gabaafameera.

title: Will the war on Iran affect ASEAN’s efforts to tackle regional issues?
english: Foreign ministers from Southeast Asia are meeting in Manila to discuss critical regional challenges like the conflict in Myanmar and South China Sea disputes. However, the ongoing hostilities between the United States and Iran have become a major distraction, raising concerns about energy, food security, and global economic stability. There are growing worries that this international crisis will hinder ASEAN's ability to focus on and effectively resolve its own internal security issues.
amharic: የደቡብ ምስራቅ እስያ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትሮች እንደ ምያንማር የእርስ በእርስ ጦርነት እና የደቡብ ቻይና ባህር ግጭቶችን የመሳሰሉ ክልላዊ ጉዳዮችን ለመወያየት በማኒላ ተሰብስበዋል። ይሁን እንጂ በአሜሪካ እና በኢራን መካከል የተቀሰቀሰው ግጭት ለስብሰባው ትልቅ እንቅፋት ሆኗል፤ ይህም በኢነርጂ፣ በምግብ አቅርቦት እና በአለም አቀፍ ኢኮኖሚ ላይ ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ይህ አለም አቀፍ ቀውስ የደቡብ ምስራቅ እስያ ሀገራት ማህበር (ASEAN) የራሱን ክልላዊ የደህንነት ጉዳዮች ለመፍታት የሚያደርገውን ጥረት ያደናቅፋል ተብሎ ተሰግቷል።
oromo: Ministiroonni dhimma alaa biyyoota Kibba-baha Eeshiyaa dhimmoota naannawaa kanneen akka waraana biyya Miyaanmaar fi wal-dhabdee garba Chaayinaa Kibbaa irratti mari'achuuf Maanilaatti walga'aniiru. Ta'us, wal-dhabdeen gidduu Ameerikaa fi Iiraan uumame xiyyeeffannoo walga'ichaa fudhachuu isaatiin walqabatee, dhiyeessii anniisaa, nyaataa fi tasgabbii dinagdee addunyaa irratti soda uumeera. Dhimmi idil-addunyaa kun gamtaan ASEAN dhimmoota nageenya naannoo isaa irratti xiyyeeffachuu fi furmaata kennuuf carraaqqii inni taasisu irratti dhiibbaa geessisa jedhamee sodaatama.

title: Thousands forced to evacuate as wildfires sweep across southern France
english: Massive wildfires in southern France have triggered large-scale evacuations as emergency teams work to contain the flames. Experts attribute the severity of these fires to climate change, which is causing harsher heatwaves and drier conditions. These factors are leading to more dangerous and frequent fire seasons throughout the European region.
amharic: በደቡባዊ ፈረንሳይ የተቀሰቀሰው ከፍተኛ የእሳት አደጋ በሺዎች የሚቆጠሩ ሰዎችን ከመኖሪያቸው እንዲፈናቀሉ አስገድዷል። የእሳት አደጋ መከላከል ቡድኖች እሳቱን ለመቆጣጠር ከፍተኛ ጥረት እያደረጉ ይገኛሉ። ባለሙያዎች እንደሚናገሩት፣ በአየር ንብረት ለውጥ ምክንያት እየጨመረ የመጣው ሙቀትና ድርቅ በየጊዜው የሚከሰቱ የእሳት አደጋዎችን ይበልጥ አደገኛ እያደረጋቸው ነው።
oromo: Fayyaan bosonaa kibba Faransaayitti ka'e namoota kumaatamaan lakka'aman bakka jireenya isaanii irraa akka godaanan dirqisiiseera. Gareen gargaarsa hatattamaa ibidda kana dhaamsuuf carraaqqii cimaa gochaa jiru. Hayyoonni akka ibsanitti, jijjiiramni qilleensaa kutaalee Awurooppaa keessatti huubaa fi hongee hammaataa uumuun, ibidda bosonaa akkaan hamaa fi miidhaa geessisu ta'uun isaa ibsameera.

title: US attacks Iran for 12th night as the House approves defence spending
english: For the twelfth consecutive night, the United States has launched military strikes against Iran. This escalation coincides with the House of Representatives passing a $95 billion defense funding package. Reports suggest that President Trump is currently weighing the possibility of broadening the scope of these ongoing military operations.
amharic: አሜሪካ ለተከታታይ አስራ ሁለተኛው ቀን በኢራን ላይ የአየር ድብደባ ፈጽማለች። ይህ ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴ የተካሄደው የአሜሪካ የተወካዮች ምክር ቤት 95 ቢሊዮን ዶላር የሚጠጋ ተጨማሪ የወታደራዊ ወጪ በጀት ካጸደቀ በኋላ ነው። ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕም የእነዚህን ጥቃቶች ስፋት ለመጨመር እያሰቡ መሆናቸው ተነግሯል።
oromo: Ameerikaan guyyaa kudha-lamaffaaf walitti aansee Iranirratti weerara waraanaa gaggeessiteetti. Tarkaanfiin kun kan fudhatame mana maree bakka bu'oota uummataa biyyattii kanaan baajata waraanaa dolaara biliyoona 95 erga ragga'ee boodadha. Prezedantiin Donald Tiraampis weerara kana gara fuulduraatti bal'isuuf yaadaa akka jiran gabaafameera.

title: Saudi Arabia and US agree to landmark nuclear deal for civilian purposes
english: The United States and Saudi Arabia have finalized a significant agreement that permits Riyadh to utilize American technology for the development of civilian nuclear reactors. Negotiations had been delayed for years due to previous U.S. demands linking the deal to the normalization of ties with Israel. Ultimately, this condition was removed, allowing the two nations to move forward with the energy project.
amharic: ሳውዲ አረቢያ እና አሜሪካ ሳውዲ አረቢያ የአሜሪካን ቴክኖሎጂ በመጠቀም የሲቪል የኑክሌር ኃይል ማመንጫዎችን እንድትገነባ የሚያስችል ስምምነት ተፈራርመዋል። ይህ ስምምነት ሳውዲ አረቢያ ከእስራኤል ጋር ግንኙነቷን እንድታስተካክል በአሜሪካ የቀረበው ቅድመ ሁኔታ ለረጅም ዓመታት እንዲዘገይ አድርጎት ነበር። በመጨረሻም ይህ ቅድመ ሁኔታ ተነስቶ ስምምነቱ እንዲጸድቅ ተደርጓል።
oromo: Saudii Arabiyaa fi Ameerikaan biyyattii Saudii Arabiyaa teeknoolojii Ameerikaatti fayyadamuun buufataalee anniisaa niwuukilaraa hojjechuu ishee kan hayyamu waliigaltee seena qabeessa ta'e tokko mallatteessaniiru. Waliigaltee kana dura Ameerikaan Saudii Arabiyaa quunnamtii ishee Israa'el waliin akka fooyyessitu gaafachaa turtee ture, kunis waggoota dheeraaf waliigaltee kana dhoorkee ture. Dhuma irratti garuu gaaffin kun kaafamee waliigalteen kun akka milkaa'u taasifameera.

title: Indian police accused of using pellet guns in crackdown on India’s protests
english: Police in New Delhi are facing serious allegations of using excessive force against student protesters. Reports indicate that over 100 students have been wounded during the demonstrations. Activists claim that officers deployed pellet guns to suppress the movement, raising concerns about violent policing tactics.
amharic: የኒው ዴልሂ ፖሊስ በተማሪ ተቃዋሚዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ ኃይል ተጠቅሟል በሚል እየተወገዘ ነው። በደረሱ ሪፖርቶች መሠረት ከ100 በላይ የሚሆኑ ተማሪዎች በተቃውሞው ወቅት ጉዳት ደርሶባቸዋል። ባለሥልጣናቱ ተቃውሞውን ለመበተን የጠመንጃ ጥይቶችን (pellet guns) በመጠቀማቸው የጸጥታ ኃይሎቹ የሚከተሉት የኃይል እርምጃ አሳሳቢ ሆኗል።
oromo: Poolisiin magaalaa Niiu Deelhii barattoota mormii geggeessaa jiran irratti humna garmalee fayyadameera jedhamee himatameera. Gabaasawwan akka agarsiisanitti, mormii kana irratti barattoonni 100 ol ta'an miidhamaniiru. Poolisiin mormicha dhaabsisuuf rasaasa bitaa-mirgatti faca'u (pellet guns) itti fayyadameera jechuun himannoon dhiyaachaa jiru soda guddaa uumeera.

title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
english: Yemen's Houthi rebels have claimed responsibility for attacking Saudi oil tankers in the Red Sea using drones and missiles. Simultaneously, the United States conducted its 12th night of airstrikes against Iranian military targets to curb threats to international shipping. These escalations, which include reports of fatalities and explosions, have significantly heightened regional tensions and disrupted maritime security in critical waterways.
amharic: የየመን የሁቲ ታጣቂዎች በቀይ ባህር ውስጥ በሚገኙ የሳዑዲ ነዳጅ ማመላለሻ መርከቦች ላይ በድሮን እና በረዥም ርቀት ሚሳኤሎች ጥቃት መፈጸማቸውን አስታውቀዋል። በተመሳሳይ ወቅት፣ አሜሪካ በአለም አቀፍ የባህር ላይ ትራንስፖርት ላይ የሚደርሰውን ስጋት ለመቀነስ ያቀደውን የአየር ጥቃት ለ12ኛ ተከታታይ ቀን ቀጥላለች። እነዚህ ክስተቶች የሰውን ህይወት ከመቅጠፋቸውም በላይ በክልሉ ያለውን የደህንነት ውጥረት እጅግ አባብሰውታል።
oromo: Humni fincilaa Huutii kan Yaman, dooniiwwan boba'aa kan Sa'udii Arabaa kan Galaana Diimaa keessa jiran irratti miilaa fi xiyyaara maleeyyuun (drones) haleellaa raawwachuu isaanii ibsaniiru. Yeroo wal fakkaatuutti, Ameerikaan eegumsa geejjiba galaanaaf jechuun qilleensarraa haleellaa ishee guyyaa 12ffaaf itti fuftee jirti. Haleellaan kun lubbuu namaa kan galaafate yoo ta'u, tasgabbii dhabuu naannichaa fi nageenya daandiiwwan bishaanirraa baay'ee yaaddessaa taasiseera.

title: In Gaza, a long path to recovery for one woman who lost eye, and daughter
english: Najwa Abu Atiwi, a resident of Gaza, suffered severe facial injuries and lost an eye during an Israeli air strike on her home in 2024. After waking from a coma, she discovered not only that her face was permanently altered, but also that her young daughter, Hajar, had been killed in the same attack. She is currently undergoing a difficult process of medical surgeries and physical rehabilitation while grieving the tragic loss of her child.
amharic: የጋዛ ነዋሪ የሆኑት ናጅዋ አቡ አቲዊ እ.ኤ.አ በ2024 በቤታቸው ላይ በተፈጸመ የአየር ጥቃት የፊት ላይ ከባድ ጉዳት ደርሶባቸው አንድ ዓይናቸውን አጥተዋል። ከኮማ ከነቁ በኋላ የፊታቸው ገጽታ መቀየሩን ብቻ ሳይሆን በአותו ጥቃት የ6 ዓመት ሴት ልጃቸው ሀጃር እንደሞተች ለማወቅ ችለዋል። በአሁኑ ወቅት ከባድ የህክምና ቀዶ ጥገናዎችን እና የአካል ማገገሚያ ሂደቶችን እየተከታተሉ ሲሆን የልጃቸውን ማጣት ጥልቅ ሀዘን እየተጋፈጡ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: jiraattuun magaalaa Gaaza Najwaa Abuu Atiwi, bara 2024 mana ishee irratti haleellaa qilleensaa Israa'el irra ga'een fuula ishee irratti miidhaan cimaan ga'ee ija ishee tokko dhabdeetti. Erga komaa keessaa baatee booda, fuulli ishee guutummaatti jijjiiramee arguu ishee qofa osoo hin ta'in, intalli ishee xinniyyoon Hajaar haleellaa sanaan du'uu ishee hubatteetti. Yeroo ammaa kana yaala baqaqsanii hodhuu fi hordoffii qaamaa cimaa keessa jirtu, gadda intala ishee dhabuu wajjinis qabsaa'aa jirti.

title: Why Abderrahim Fakir’s death reignited Italy’s police accountability debate
english: The death of Abderrahim Fakir, a Moroccan-born man who passed away while being restrained by police in Bologna, has sparked significant outrage and protests across Italy. Video footage showing him struggling while officers and medical responders failed to intervene has led to renewed demands for police accountability and legal reform. This incident has drawn parallels to other high-profile cases of deaths in custody, highlighting long-standing concerns regarding the conduct of Italian law enforcement.
amharic: በቦሎኛ ከተማ በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር በነበረበት ወቅት ህይወቱ ያለፈው አብደራሂም ፋኪር ሞት ጣሊያን ውስጥ ከፍተኛ ቁጣን እና ተቃውሞን አስነስቷል። ተጎጂው ሲያቃስት ፖሊሶች እና የህክምና ባለሙያዎች ጣልቃ ሳይገቡ መቆየታቸውን የሚያሳይ የቪዲዮ ማስረጃ የፖሊስ ተጠያቂነትን እና የህግ ማሻሻያዎችን እንዲጠየቅ አድርጓል። ይህ ክስተት ከዚህ ቀደም በፖሊስ ቁጥጥር ስር በነበሩ ሰዎች ሞት ዙሪያ የነበሩ የረጅም ጊዜ ስጋቶችን ዳግም አቀጣጥሏል።
oromo: Abderrahim Faakir, namni lammii Morookoo ta'e tokko magaalaa Boloonyatti harka poolisootaa jala osoo jiruu du'uun isaa mormii fi aarii guddaa Xaaliyaanii keessatti kaasera. Viidiyoon nama kanaa osoo inni gargaarsa kadhatuu poolisoonniifi gargaartonni yaalii fayyaa gargaarsa dhabuu isaa agarsiisu kun, gaaffii itti gaafatamummaa poolisaa fi jijjiirama seeraa daran jabeessera. Ta'een kun du'a namoota kanaan dura harka poolisaatti darbeen walqabatee yaaddoo cimaa uumeera.

title: Spain and France battle raging wildfires, face high risk of more
english: Spain and France are currently grappling with severe wildfires fueled by record-breaking summer heatwaves and extreme climate conditions. One major fire in Spain’s Guadalajara region has destroyed over 32,000 hectares, marking it as one of the country's largest incidents on record. Authorities warn that the danger remains extreme as rising temperatures and dry weather continue to threaten both nations.
amharic: ስፔን እና ፈረንሳይ በአሁኑ ወቅት በከፍተኛ ሙቀት እና በአየር ንብረት ለውጥ ምክንያት በተቀሰቀሱ አደገኛ የዱር እሳቶች እየተቸገሩ ይገኛሉ። በስፔን የጓዳላጃራ ክልል የተቀሰቀሰው ግዙፍ የእሳት አደጋ ከ32,000 ሄክታር በላይ መሬትን ያወደመ ሲሆን ይህም በአገሪቱ ታሪክ ውስጥ ትልቁ እንደሆነ ተገልጿል። ባለሥልጣናት እንደገለጹት፣ አሁንም ያለው ከፍተኛ ሙቀትና ደረቅ የአየር ሁኔታ ስጋቱን የበለጠ እያባባሰው በመሆኑ ጥንቃቄ እንዲደረግ አሳስበዋል።
oromo: Ispeeniifi Faransaay amma amma qilleensa ho’aa qorichaa fi jijjiirama qilleensaan kan ka’e ibidda bosonaa hamaa waliin wal’aansoo gochaa jiru. Iddoo Gwadalaajaaraa jedhamu kan Ispeen keessatti ibidda ka’een lafti heektaara 32,000 ol ta’u barbadaa’eera; kunis seenaa biyyattii keessatti ibidda gurguddaadha. Ogeeyyiin akka jedhanitti, ho’i qa’eefi qilleensi gogaan akkuma itti fufeen balaan kun daran hammaachuu waan danda’uuf, uummanni cimaa akka of eegu akeekkachiisaniiru.

title: US tariffs ‘strengthen’ Lula against Bolsonaro’s son in upcoming elections
english: New US trade tariffs on Brazilian goods are ironically boosting President Lula da Silva's popularity ahead of the October general election. By positioning himself as a strong defender of national sovereignty against American economic pressure, Lula is gaining an advantage over his opponent, Flavio Bolsonaro. Recent polling shows Lula currently leading the race, suggesting that the Bolsonaro family's strategy of relying on Washington's influence is backfiring.
amharic: በብራዚል ምርቶች ላይ የተጣለው የአሜሪካ የታሪፍ ጫና ባለፈው ምርጫ ተወዳዳሪው ሉላ ዳ ሲልቫ ተወዳጅነት እንዲጨምር እያደረገው ነው። ፕሬዝዳንቱ የታሪፍ ውሳኔውን እንደ ሀገር ሉዓላዊነት ጥሰት በመቁጠር ለህዝባቸው የቆመ መሪ መሆናቸውን በማሳየታቸው በተቃዋሚው ፍላቪዮ ቦልሶናሮ ላይ መሪነታቸውን አጠናክረዋል። የቅርብ ጊዜ የሕዝብ አስተያየት ውጤቶች እንደሚያሳዩት የቦልሶናሮ ቤተሰብ ከአሜሪካ ጋር ያላቸው የጠበቀ ግንኙነት በምርጫው ላይ ተጽዕኖ ለመፍጠር ያሰቡት ስልት ውጤታማ እየሆነ አይደለም።
oromo: Gibira daldalaa Ameerikaan meeshaalee biyya Brazil irratti keesse kun, filannoo dhufu irratti mormaa jiru Prezidaant Lula da Silvaaf deeggarsa guddaa ta'eera. Lula dhiibbaa diinagdee Ameerikaa kanaan ofii isaa eegduu kabajaa biyyaa fi mootummaa taasisee dhiyeessuun isaa, morkataa isaa Flavio Bolsonaro irratti harka caalmaa akka argatu isa gargaareera. Qorannoon sagalee filannoo akka agarsiisutti, Lula dursee waan jiruuf, maatii Bolsonaro waajjira Washington irratti hirkachuun filannoo kana injifachuuf qaban kun milkaa'aa hin jiru.

title: US House passes $1.15 trillion military bill expanding Israel cooperation
english: The US House of Representatives narrowly approved a $1.15 trillion defense spending bill that boosts military cooperation with Israel and funds the ongoing war with Iran. The legislation faces significant hurdles in the Senate, where Democratic opposition remains strong due to the bill's high cost and its inclusion of controversial policy shifts. Critics argue that the increased military funding comes at the expense of domestic social programs and ties the US defense sector too closely to Israel.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የተወካዮች ምክር ቤት ከእስራኤል ጋር ያለውን ወታደራዊ ትብብር የሚያጠናክር እና ከኢራን ጋር ለሚካሄደው ጦርነት የሚውል 1.15 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር የመከላከያ በጀት በጠባብ ድምፅ አጽድቋል። ይህ ረቂቅ ህግ በከፍተኛ ወጪው እና አወዛጋቢ በሆኑ የፖሊሲ ለውጦች ምክንያት በሴኔቱ በኩል ጠንካራ ተቃውሞ እየገጠመው ነው። ተቺዎች እንደሚሉት ይህ ከፍተኛ ወታደራዊ በጀት ለማህበራዊ አገልግሎቶች የሚውለውን ገንዘብ የሚቀንስ እና የአሜሪካን የመከላከያ ዘርፍ ከእስራኤል ጋር ከመጠን በላይ የሚያስተሳስር ነው።
oromo: Mana maree bakka buutota ummataa Ameerikaa, waliigaltee waraana kan Israa'el waliin cimsuu fi waraana Iran waliin gaggeeffamuuf kan gargaaru doolaara tiriliyoona 1.15 baajata ittisa biyyaa raggaaseera. Labsichi baasii isaa guddaa fi jijjiirama siyaasaa mormisiisaa qabatee jiruuf mormii cimaa Mana Maree Ol-aanaa (Senate) irraa mudateera. Qeeqonni akka jedhanitti, daballiin baajata waraanaa kun tajaajila hawaasummaa miidhuu fi sektara ittisa Ameerikaa Israa'el waliin walitti hidhuu isaa isaan yaaddessa.

title: Attacks on Iran will be met with a "powerful and decisive" response, Aragchi warns
english: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has declared that his country will retaliate with significant force against any future attacks on its territory or infrastructure. He emphasized a policy of direct retaliation, warning that any nation assisting in such hostile actions will also be viewed as a valid military target. This statement underscores Iran's commitment to protecting its sovereign interests through aggressive counter-measures.
amharic: የኢራን የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር አባስ አራግቺ በኢራን ግዛት ወይም መሠረተ ልማት ላይ የሚሰነዘር ማንኛውም ጥቃት በጠንካራ ሁኔታ እንደሚመከት አስታውቀዋል። ኢራን ለሚሰነዘርባት ጥቃት አጸፋዊ እርምጃ እንደምትወስድ የገለጹት ሚኒስትሩ፣ በጥቃቱ ውስጥ እገዛ የሚያደርጉ አካላትም እንደ ኢላማ እንደሚቆጠሩ አስጠንቅቀዋል። ይህ መግለጫ ኢራን የራሷን ሉዓላዊነት ለመከላከል ጠንካራ አቋም መያዟን ያሳያል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimmi Alaa Iraan Abbas Aragchi, biyyi isaanii qe'ee ykn bu'uuraalee misoomaa isaanii irratti weerarri kamiyyuu yoo gaggeeffame deebii cimaa fi murtaa'aa ta'e akka kennan ibsan. Iraan tarkaanfii akkasii irratti hirmaannaa kan taasisan hundiis akka diinaatti kan ilaalaman ta'uu akeekkachiisaniiru. Ibsi kun, Iraan naannoo ishee irratti miidhaan kamiyyuu akka hin qaqqabne gochuuf murannoo cimaa akka qabdu kan agarsiisuudha.

title: US warns citizens in the Middle East to 'exercise caution'
english: The US government has issued a global safety alert advising its citizens in the Middle East to remain alert due to rising regional instability. Travelers are warned that geopolitical tensions could lead to sudden flight cancellations, airspace closures, and other logistical challenges. Additionally, the State Department highlighted the possibility of increased security risks directed at American properties worldwide.
amharic: የአሜሪካ መንግሥት በመካከለኛው ምስራቅ ለሚገኙ ዜጎቹ በክልሉ እየተባባሰ ባለው ግጭት ምክንያት ከፍተኛ ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ አሳስቧል። በአካባቢው ያለው የፀጥታ ሁኔታ ውስብስብ በመሆኑ፣ የበረራ ስረዛዎች እና የአየር ክልል መዘጋት ሊያጋጥሙ እንደሚችሉ ተገልጿል። እንዲሁም፣ በዓለም ዙሪያ የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ተቋማት የጥቃት ዒላማ ሊሆኑ እንደሚችሉ መንግሥቱ አስጠንቅቋል።
oromo: Mootummaan Ameerikaa lammiileen isaa naannoo Baha Gidduu galeessa jiran tasgabbii dhabuu naannichaa irraa kan ka'e of eeggannoo cimaa akka taasisan akeekkachiiseera. Walitti bu'iinsi naannichaa kun balaliin xiyyaaraa akka addaan cituufi qilleensi naannichaa akka cufamu taasisuu danda'a. Kana malees, dhaabbileen Ameerikaa addunyaa irra jiran miidhamuu akka danda'an yaadachiiseera.

title: US passes $1 trillion military spending bill
english: The U.S. House of Representatives has narrowly approved a massive $1.15 trillion military spending bill, mostly supported by Republicans. Democrats expressed strong opposition, citing concerns over the high cost, potential military conflicts, and increased security cooperation with Israel. The legislation now faces an uncertain future in the Senate as lawmakers debate its impact on national budget priorities.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የተወካዮች ምክር ቤት በአብዛኛው በሪፐብሊካኖች ድጋፍ 1.15 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር የሚጠጋ ግዙፍ የወታደራዊ በጀት ረቂቅ አጽድቋል። ዴሞክራቶች ከፍተኛ ወጪውን፣ ሊፈጠሩ የሚችሉ ግጭቶችን እና ከእስራኤል ጋር የተጠናከረ ወታደራዊ ትብብርን በመቃወም ድምጻቸውን ሰጥተዋል። ህጉ ወደ ሴኔት ሲያመራ በበጀት አጠቃቀም ላይ ባለው ልዩነት የተነሳ የወደፊት ዕጣ ፈንታው አጠራጣሪ ሆኗል።
oromo: Mana maree bakka bu'oota ummataa Ameerikaa bajata waraanaaf oolu kan tilmaama doolaara tiriliyoona 1.15 ta'u sagalee dhiphaan raggaasiseera. Miseensonni paartii Dimokiraata baasiin kun guddaa ta'uu fi hidhannoo Israa'el wajjin wal qabatu mormaniiru. Labsii kana irratti garaagarummaan siyaasaa waan jiruuf, gara fuulduraatti seera ta'uun isaa gara mana maree seeneraatti murtaa'a.

title: Centcom said latest round of strikes on Iran 'completed'
english: The U.S. Central Command has finished its most recent series of military strikes against Iranian targets. This operation marks the twelfth consecutive night of attacks, which specifically aimed at missile systems, drone storage, and maritime defense assets. These actions reflect an ongoing military effort by the United States to degrade Iran's regional defense and surveillance capabilities.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ሴንትኮም በኢራን ወታደራዊ ኢላማዎች ላይ ሲያካሂድ የነበረውን የአየር ጥቃት ማጠናቀቁን አስታውቋል። ይህ ጥቃት ለተከታታይ አስራ ሁለተኛው ሌሊት የተፈፀመ ሲሆን፣ በዋናነት ሚሳኤሎችን፣ ድሮኖችን እና የባህር ኃይል መከላከያ መሳሪያዎችን ለማውደም ያለመ ነው። እነዚህ እርምጃዎች የኢራንን ወታደራዊ አቅም ለማዳከም አሜሪካ የምትወስዳቸው ተከታታይ የጥቃት እርምጃዎች አካል ናቸው።
oromo: Ajajni Waraana Amerikaa (CENTCOM) ganda Iran irratti duula waraanaa guyyoota kudha lamaaf adeemsisaa ture xumuruu isaa beeksiseera. Duulli kun balaliiwwan waraanaa, kuusaa misaa'elaa fi meeshaalee ittisa galaana irratti xiyyeeffachuun raawwatameera. Tarkaanfiin kun dandeettii waraana Iran laaffisuuf Amerikaan walitti aansuun kan fudhatteedha.

title: US strike on Iran's border with Iraq kills two
english: A US missile strike at the Shalamcheh border crossing between Iran and Iraq resulted in two deaths and eleven injuries. Additional missile attacks were also reported in the Iranian cities of Bushehr and Andimeshk. Local officials are currently investigating the impact of these strikes as further details are pending.
amharic: በኢራን እና ኢራቅ ድንበር ላይ በሚገኘው የሻላምቼ ማቋረጫ ላይ በአሜሪካ በተፈጸመ የሮኬት ጥቃት ሁለት ሰዎች ሲሞቱ 11 ሰዎች ቆስለዋል። በተጨማሪም በኢራን የቡሼህር እና የአንዲሜሽክ ከተሞች ላይ ተመሳሳይ የሮኬት ጥቃቶች ተፈጽመዋል። የሀገሪቱ ባለስልጣናት በደረሰው ጉዳት ላይ ምርመራ እያደረጉ ሲሆን ተጨማሪ መረጃዎችንም ይፋ እንደሚያደርጉ ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Humni waraana Ameerikaa daangaa biyyoota Iraan fi Iraaq gidduutti argamu Shalamcheh irratti dhukaasa raaketeetiin ajjeechaa namoota lamaa fi madaa'uu namoota 11 geessiseera. Kana malees, magaalota Iraan kan ta'an Bushehr fi Andimeshk irratti haleellaan raaketaa biraa raawwatameera. Aangeyyonni naannichaa miidhaa qaqqabe irratti qorannoo geggeessaa jiru.

title: Russia's businesses under strain from Ukraine's attacks on Wildberries
english: Ukrainian drone strikes have targeted several warehouses belonging to Wildberries, Russia's largest online retailer, causing significant damage and loss of life. While Kyiv claims these logistics hubs are being used to support military supplies, the attacks have severely impacted many small Russian business owners who rely on the platform. This escalation is bringing the direct consequences of the war to the Russian civilian population as both sides continue to target each other's commercial infrastructure.
amharic: የዩክሬን ድሮኖች የሩሲያ ትልቁ የኢንተርኔት የችርቻሮ መሸጫ ድርጅት የሆነውን የዋይልድቤሪስ (Wildberries) መጋዘኖችን ማጥቃታቸውን ተከትሎ ከፍተኛ ጉዳት እና የሰው ህይወት መጥፋት ተከስቷል። ዩክሬን እነዚህ ቦታዎች ለወታደራዊ ግብዓት አቅርቦት ይውላሉ ብትልም፣ ጥቃቱ መድረኩን ለስራቸው የሚጠቀሙ ብዙ የሩሲያ አነስተኛ ነጋዴዎችን በእጅጉ ጎድቷል። ይህ ድርጊት ጦርነቱ ወደ ተራው የሩሲያ ህዝብ መኖሪያ እየተጠጋ መምጣቱን የሚያሳይ ሲሆን፣ ሁለቱም ወገኖች የርስ በርስ የንግድ መሰረተ ልማቶችን ኢላማ ማድረጋቸውን ቀጥለዋል።
oromo: Humni waraana Yukreeni, bakka gurgurtaa meeshaalee intarneetii kan Raashiyaa guddaa ta'e Wildberries irratti erga weerara dhooyee booda miidhaan guddaan ga'eera. Yukreen, giddu-galeeyyonni kun meeshaalee waraanaaf gargaaran jettee himattus, weerarri kun daldaltoota xixiqqoo irratti dhiibbaa cimaa uumeera. Qilleensi waraanaa kun gara biyya Raashiyaa keessatti babal'achaa waan jiruuf, namoota idilee biyyattii irra miidhaa geessisaa jira; gama biraatiinis, garuu walgahii lachuu walii isaanii irratti weerara suuqii fi bakka meeshaaleen itti kuufaman irratti bananii jiru.

title: Austrian home where Hitler was born reopened as police station
english: The house in Austria where Adolf Hitler was born has officially reopened as a local police station. This transformation follows a multi-million dollar renovation project aimed at repurposing the site. The move is intended to prevent the location from continuing to serve as a destination for neo-Nazi sympathizers and extremists.
amharic: አዶልፍ ሂትለር የተወለደበት የአውስትሪያ ቤት በይፋ የፖሊስ ጣቢያ ሆኖ ተከፍቷል። ይህ ለውጥ የተደረገው ቦታውን በአዲስ መልክ ለመቀየር በወጣ በሚሊዮን የሚቆጠር ዶላር ወጪ በተደረገበት እድሳት ነው። እርምጃው የናዚ ደጋፊዎችና አክራሪ ቡድኖች ቦታውን እንደ መታሰቢያ እንዳይጠቀሙበት ለመከላከል ታስቦ የተወሰደ ነው።
oromo: Mana Adolf Hitler itti dhalate kan Awustiraa keessatti argamu, amma gara waajjira poolisiitti jijjiiramee hojii jalqabeera. Jijjiirraan kun kan raawwatame pirojektii haaromsa miliyoonaan lakkaawwamu baasii godhee booda dha. Tarkaanfiin kun gareewwan naazii fi namoota hammaattoota ta'an iddoo kana akka bakka kabajaatti fayyadamuu akka hin dandeenye ittisuuf kan karoorfame dha.

title: Yemen’s Houthis claim attack on two Saudi oil tankers
english: Yemen’s Houthi rebels have launched missile and drone attacks against two Saudi Arabian oil tankers traveling through the Red Sea. The group stated the assault was a response to the tankers violating a recently declared maritime blockade against Saudi vessels. While Saudi authorities have not yet responded, international maritime monitors confirmed that a ship was struck and is currently dealing with onboard fires.
amharic: የየመን የሁቲ አማጽያን በቀይ ባህር ውስጥ ሲጓዙ የነበሩ ሁለት የሳውዲ አረቢያ የነዳጅ መርከቦች ላይ የሚሳኤል እና የድሮን ጥቃት ማድረሳቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ቡድኑ ጥቃቱን የፈጸመው መርከቦቹ በሳውዲ መርከቦች ላይ የጣሉትን የባህር ላይ እገዳ በመጣሳቸው ምክንያት መሆኑን ገልጿል። የሳውዲ ባለስልጣናት እስካሁን በጉዳዩ ላይ አስተያየት ባይሰጡም፣ ዓለም አቀፍ የባህር ላይ ደህንነት ተቆጣጣሪዎች አንዱ መርከብ ተመቶ እሳት እንደተነሳበት አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Warraqaaleen Houthii kan Yaman, dooniiwwan boba'aa Saudii lama kan galaana diimaa keessa darbaa turan irratti haleellaa misa'elaa fi doonii qilleensa irra (drone) raawwachuu isaanii ibsaniiru. Gareen kun akka ibsetti, haleellaa kana kan raawwatan dooniiwwan kunneen dhoorkaa galaana irraa isaan Saudii irratti labsan cabsuu isaaniitiif. Mootummaan Saudii hanga ammaatti waan tokko hin jenne, garuu dhaabbileen nageenya galaana irratti hordofan dooniin tokko rukutamtee ibida keessa akka jirtu mirkaneessaniiru.

title: Rubio says US, China must ‘work through’ big differences at ASEAN meeting
english: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi during the ASEAN summit in Manila to address ongoing tensions between the two nations. The primary goal of the meeting was to manage significant disagreements and prepare for President Xi Jinping’s upcoming visit to the United States. Despite recent friction over regional conflicts and diplomatic accusations, both sides described the discussion as a constructive step toward improving high-level cooperation.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የውጭ ጉዳይ ሚኒስትር ማርኮ ሩቢዮ በፊሊፒንስ መዲና ማኒላ በተካሄደው የASEAN ስብሰባ ወቅት ከቻይና አቻቸው ዋንግ ይ ጋር ተወያይተዋል። የውይይቱ ዋና ዓላማ በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለውን አለመግባባት ለመቀነስ እና የቻይናው ፕሬዚዳንት ዢ ጂንፒንግ ወደ አሜሪካ የሚያደርጉትን ጉብኝት ማዘጋጀት ነው። በክልላዊ ግጭቶች እና በዲፕሎማሲያዊ ክሶች ምክንያት ውጥረት ቢኖርም፣ ሁለቱ ወገኖች ንግግራቸውን ከፍተኛ ደረጃ ያለው ግንኙነትን ለማሻሻል የሚያግዝ ገንቢ እርምጃ ሲሉ ገልጸውታል።
oromo: Ministirri Dhimma Alaa Ameerikaa Maarko Ruubiyoon, walga'ii ASEAN kan Maaniilaa irratti ministira dhimma alaa Chaayinaa Waang Yi waliin wal arganii mari'ataniiru. Kaayyoon marii kanaa jijjiiramaa fi wal-dhabdee biyyoota lamaan gidduu jiru tasgabbeessuu akkasumas daawwannaa pirezidaant Si Jinpiing gara Ameerikaatti taasisan qophii gaarii irratti gochuudha. Garaagarummaan siyaasaa fi rakkooleen naannoo jiratanis, gamni lamaanuu mariin isaanii hariiroo sadarkaa olaanaa fooyyessuuf bu'uura gaarii akka ta'e ibsaniiru.

title: Kuwait intercepts Iranian drones
english: Kuwait's military has deployed its air defense systems to successfully intercept drones launched from Iran. Officials clarified that any loud explosions heard in the area are the result of these defensive actions. The public is urged to follow all official security guidelines while the situation is monitored.
amharic: የኩዌት ወታደራዊ ኃይል ከኢራን የተላኩ ድሮኖችን ለመመከት የአየር መከላከያ ስርዓቱን አንቅቷል። በየአካባቢው የሚሰሙት የፍንዳታ ድምፆች የመከላከያ እርምጃዎች ውጤት እንደሆኑ መንግስት አስታውቋል። ህዝቡም ከባለስልጣናት የሚሰጡትን የደህንነት መመሪያዎች በጥብቅ እንዲከተል ጥሪ ቀርቧል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyyaa Kuweeti xiyyoota bilaash kanneen Iraan irraa dhufan qolachuuf sirna ittisa qilleensa isaa hojii irra oolcheera. Sagaleen dhoohaa bakka garaagaraatti dhagahamaa jiru kun tarkaanfii ittisaa kana irraa kan madde ta'uu ibsameera. Ummanni qajeelfama nageenyaa qaamolee dhimmi ilaallatu irraa kennamu hordofuu akka qabu dhaamameera.

title: US military launches new round of strikes on Iran
english: Following instructions from President Trump, the US military has initiated another series of attacks against Iranian military assets. These operations are intended to weaken Iran's capacity to endanger merchant ships and civilian crews navigating the region. Officials stated that these military actions are ongoing to ensure maritime safety.
amharic: ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ በሰጡት ትዕዛዝ መሰረት፣ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በኢራን ወታደራዊ ኢላማዎች ላይ አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸም ጀምረዋል። የዚህ ኦፕሬሽን ዋና ዓላማ ኢራን በቀጠናው በኩል የሚያልፉ የንግድ መርከቦችን እና የሲቪል ሰራተኞችን እንዳትጎዳ አቅሟን ማዳከም ነው። የባህር ላይ ደህንነትን ለማረጋገጥ እነዚህ ወታደራዊ እርምጃዎች ተጠናክረው እንደሚቀጥሉ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Prezidaant tiraamp ajaja kennaniin, waraanni Yuusiiin (US) qajeelfamaa fi giddugaleessa waraana Iraan irratti haleellaa haarawaa jalqabeera. Haleellaan kun kan qajeelfame dandeettii Iraan malkaa sana keessa imaltuuwwan daldalaa fi namoota nagaa irratti miidhaa geessisuu dadhabsiisuufi. Nageenya daandii bishaanii mirkaneessuuf, tarkaanfiin waraanaa kun itti fufiinsaan kan gaggeeffamu ta'uun ibsameera.

title: US House passes $1 trillion defence bill including Israeli military integration
english: The U.S. House of Representatives narrowly approved a record-breaking $1.15 trillion defense spending bill. The vote was highly divided along party lines, with most Republicans supporting it and most Democrats opposing the measure due to concerns about the budget and military policies. The legislation includes controversial provisions that strengthen Pentagon collaboration with Israel.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የተወካዮች ምክር ቤት 1.15 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር የሚጠይቅ ግዙፍ የመከላከያ በጀት ረቂቅ በጠባብ ድምፅ አጽድቋል። ውሳኔው በዋናነት በፓርቲዎች መካከል ባለው የፖለቲካ ልዩነት የተከፈለ ሲሆን አብዛኛዎቹ ሪፐብሊካኖች ሲደግፉት፣ ዲሞክራቶች ግን በበጀቱ መጠን እና በወታደራዊ ፖሊሲዎች ላይ ባላቸው ስጋት ተቃውመውታል። ሕጉ የፔንታጎንን ከእስራኤል ጋር ያለውን ወታደራዊ ትብብር የሚያጠናክሩ አንቀጾችን ያካተተ ነው።
oromo: Manni Maree Bakka Bu'oota Ummata Amerikaa baajata ittisa biyyaa kan seenaa keessatti hanga har'aatti hin mul'anne kan qophiin isaa tilmaamaan tiriliyoona 1.15 ga'u sagalee wal-caaluu dhiphoo ta'een raggaasise. Murteen kun gartuulee siyaasaa gidduutti wal-dhabdee guddaa kan uume yoo ta'u, warri Ripabilikaanii hedduun yeroo deeggaran, warri Dimokiraatootaa garuu baajata kanaa fi imaammata waraanaatiin walqabatee yaaddoo qabaachuun mormaniiru. Seerichi quunnamtii waraana Pentagoonii fi Israa'el gidduu jiru cimsuuf kan gargaaru dha.

title: Israeli settlers forcibly evict Palestinian family from West Bank home
english: Israeli settlers have seized a Palestinian home in the West Bank town of Jalud after forcing the family to evacuate. For several months, the settlers subjected the al-Tubasi family to consistent harassment, arson, and a blockade that cut off essential supplies like food, water, and electricity. This incident reflects a wider pattern of settler violence against Palestinians in the occupied territories that often goes unpunished.
amharic: የእስራኤል ሰፈራ ሰፋሪዎች በዌስት ባንክ ጃሉድ ከተማ የሚኖር አንድ የፍልስጤም ቤተሰብን በኃይል በማስወጣት መኖሪያ ቤታቸውን ተቆጣጥረዋል። ሰፋሪዎቹ ቤተሰቡን ለወራት ያህል በየቀኑ በማጥቃት፣ ቤታቸውን በእሳት በማቃጠል እና የውሃ፣ የምግብና የኤሌክትሪክ አቅርቦቶችን በመቁረጥ እንዲለቁ አስገድደዋቸዋል። ይህ ድርጊት በተያዙት ግዛቶች ውስጥ በፍልስጤማውያን ላይ የሚፈጸመው የተለመደ የጥቃት አካል ሲሆን አጥፊዎቹም በህግ እምብዛም አይጠየቁም።
oromo: Baballistoonni Israa'el magaala Jalud kan West Bank keessatti argamtu keessatti, maatii Falasxiin tokko mana isaanii irraa humnaan buqqisanii manicha to'atanii jiru. Baballistoonni kunneen ji'oota hedduuf maatii Al-Tubasii irratti miidhaa guyyuu geessisaa, mana isaanii gubaa fi humna ibsaa, bishaan akkasumas nyaataa isaan irraa kutuun akka gadi lakkisan dirqisiisani jiru. Gochi kun rakkoo baballistoonni Falasxiinota irratti geessisan kan yeroo hunda mul'atuu fi itti gaafatamummaan seeraa irratti hin fudhatamne ta'uu argisiisa.

title: Fire kills 10 members of same family in Peru, police say
english: A tragic fire in Peru's capital, Lima, has resulted in the deaths of 10 family members, including five children. Authorities are investigating claims of arson, as witnesses suggested the blaze was ignited by criminals who had previously extorted the victims. The fire spread quickly through the residence due to flammable materials used in the family's mattress business.
amharic: በፔሩ ዋና ከተማ ሊማ በተነሳ አሳዛኝ የእሳት አደጋ አምስት ህጻናትን ጨምሮ አስር የቤተሰብ አባላት ህይወታቸው አልፏል። ባለስልጣናት እሳቱ ሆን ተብሎ የተለኮሰ መሆኑን እየመረመሩ ሲሆን፣ ሰለባዎቹ ከዚህ ቀደም ለዘረፋ እና ለዛቻ የተጋለጡ እንደነበሩ ተጠቁሟል። የቤተሰቡ የአልጋ ፍራሽ ማምረቻ ስራ እሳቱ በፍጥነት እንዲስፋፋ ምክንያት እንደሆነም ተገልጿል።
oromo: Magaalaa Limaa, biyya Peeruu keessatti balaa ibiddaan namoonni maatii tokkoo 10 ta’an lubbuun isaanii darbeera; isaan keessaa shaniin ijoollee dha. Poolisiin akka jedhutti, ibiddi kun namoota maatii kana irraa qarshii saamaa turanidhaan ka’uu mala jedhamee shakkameera. Qabeenya maatiin kun itti fayyadamanii firaasha hojjetan ibidda kana ariifachiisee akka babal’atu taasiseera.

title: Iranian missiles show deadly precision amid US-Iran war escalation
english: A recent Iranian missile attack on a US military base in Jordan resulted in the deaths of three American soldiers, marking a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict. Despite repeated US air strikes, analysts note that Iran continues to improve its military precision and remains a formidable threat. Experts suggest that many US regional bases are currently vulnerable to Iran's increasingly sophisticated drone and ballistic missile capabilities.
amharic: በዮርዳኖስ በሚገኝ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጣቢያ ላይ በደረሰው የኢራን የሚሳኤል ጥቃት ሶስት አሜሪካውያን ወታደሮች መሞታቸው፣ በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል ያለው ግጭት ከፍተኛ ደረጃ ላይ መድረሱን ያሳያል። አሜሪካ በተደጋጋሚ የአየር ጥቃት ብትሰነዝርም፣ ኢራን ወታደራዊ አቅሟን በማጠናከር እና የጥቃቶቿን ትክክለኛነት በማሻሻል ስጋት መሆኗን ቀጥላለች። ባለሙያዎች እንደሚናገሩት፣ በአካባቢው ያሉ የአሜሪካ ጣቢያዎች የኢራን ዘመናዊ ሚሳኤሎችን እና ድሮኖችን ለመከላከል የሚያስችል አቅም እንደሌላቸው ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Humni waraana Iraan buufata waraana Ameerikaa kan Yordaanos keessa jiru irratti miisaayiliin rukutuu isaa hordofee loltoonni Ameerikaa sadii du'aniiru; kunis waraana amma adeemaa jiru keessatti tarkaanfii cimaa fakkaata. Ameerikaan duula qilleensa irraa yeroo baay'ee geggeessituus, Iraan dandeettii waraana ishee fooyyeessuun fi rukuttaa sirrii ta'e raawwachuun guddina argisiisaa jirti. Ogeeyyiin akka jedhanitti, buufatonni waraana Ameerikaa naannichatti argaman miisaayiloota fi diroonii Iraan ammayyaa'oo ta'an kana dura dhaabbachuuf sodaachisaa akka ta'an ibsaniiru.

title: Iran warns of regional turmoil if US threats and attacks do not stop
english: Iran has issued a stern warning that it will target regional infrastructure and oil supplies if United States military strikes against its territory continue. This escalation follows nearly two weeks of attacks by both sides that have resulted in civilian casualties and damage to essential facilities like power plants. Iranian officials have pledged a reciprocal response to any future aggression, further intensifying the ongoing conflict.
amharic: ኢራን በአገሯ ላይ የሚደርሰው የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ጥቃት ካልቆመ በመላው አካባቢው ያሉ መሠረተ ልማቶችን እና የነዳጅ አቅርቦቶችን እንደምታጠቃ አስጠንቅቃለች። ይህ ውጥረት የተፈጠረው ሁለቱም ወገኖች በሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ጥቃት በመሰንዘራቸውና ለሰው ህይወት መጥፋት ምክንያት በመሆናቸው ነው። የኢራን ባለስልጣናት ማንኛውም ተጨማሪ ጥቃት አጸፋዊ እርምጃ እንደሚያስከትል በማስታወቅ ግጭቱ ይበልጥ እየተባባሰ መምጣቱን ገልጸዋል።
oromo: Iraan, yoo weerarri waraanaa Ameerikaa biyyattii irratti geggeessitu dhaabachuu baate, bu'uuraalee misoomaa naannichaa fi dhiyeessii boba'aa irratti tarkaanfii akka fudhattu akeekkachiisteetti. Hanqinaa fi waraana lamaan gidduutti geggeeffamaa jiru kanaan bu'uuraaleen misoomaa fi lubbuun namootaa miidhamaa jiru. Mootummaan Iraan, qaqqabaa jiru kamiyyuu irratti deebii cimaa akka kennitu beeksisuun, walitti bu'iinsi naannichaa daran akka jabaatu dubbatteetti.

title: Wounded Gaza journalists call for urgent medical evacuation
english: Injured and ill journalists in Gaza recently held a protest to demand immediate medical evacuation from the territory. They stated that the local healthcare system has completely collapsed and is no longer able to provide necessary life-saving care. The group is urging international intervention to ensure they receive appropriate treatment outside the conflict zone.
amharic: በጋዛ የሚገኙ የቆሰሉ እና በህመም የሚሰቃዩ ጋዜጠኞች ከክልሉ በአስቸኳይ ወደ ውጭ ሀገር ተወስደው ህክምና እንዲያገኙ ጠይቀዋል። የአካባቢው የጤና ስርዓት ሙሉ በሙሉ በመፈራረሱ አስፈላጊውን ህክምና መስጠት እንዳልቻለ ጋዜጠኞቹ ገልጸዋል። በመሆኑም በግጭት ቀጠናው ውጭ ተገቢውን የህክምና እርዳታ ለማግኘት አለም አቀፍ ድጋፍ እንዲደረግላቸው ጥሪ አቅርበዋል።
oromo: Gaazexeessitoonni Gaza keessatti miidhaman fi dhukkubsatan, gara biyya alaa deemuun yaalamuu akka danda'an hatattamaan gaafataniiru. Sirni fayyaa naannichaa guutummaatti waan diigameef, yaalii lubbuu baraaruu kennuu akka hin dandeenye ibsaniiru. Kanaafuu, iddoo waraana kanaa ala yaala barbaachisaa ta'e argachuuf gargaarsa idil-addunyaa gaafataniiru.
